response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics perfectly match the provided reference lyrics for all three songs. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for transcribing the lyrics, but strictly truncated the output when the video ended to avoid hallucinating the remainder of 'ずうっといっしょ!'. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed subtitles precisely to vocal starts and ends. Included on-screen title text for 'Monitoring' during the instrumental transition as a visual-only trigger, while keeping instrumentals silent elsewhere.

subtitles.original: 適度にセーブ リスクは回避しつつで まあ頑張るのさ
subtitles.english: I'll save moderately, avoiding risks, and somehow keep working hard.

subtitles.original: 適当にとまでは言うまいが まあ頑張るのさ
subtitles.english: I won't go so far as to say 'half-heartedly', but I'll do my best.

subtitles.original: 夢の中では…
subtitles.english: In my dreams...

subtitles.original: ずっとぐうたらしてやるんだ
subtitles.english: I'll just laze around forever.

subtitles.original: 誰かのためとかそんなんじゃなく 明日の私のため
subtitles.english: Not for someone else's sake, but for my future self!

subtitles.original: 楽するために 苦しいことも 乗り越えちゃうんだからね
subtitles.english: To make things easier, I'll even overcome the painful things!

subtitles.original: やりたくないこと やらないために やりたくないことやれ
subtitles.english: To avoid doing what I don't want to do, I have to do what I don't want to do!

subtitles.original: あれ？これって結果頑張れてる？
subtitles.english: Huh? Does this mean I'm actually working hard?

subtitles.original: 私とってもえらいじゃないか
subtitles.english: Aren't I just super admirable?

subtitles.original: 自分時間 堕落タイム確保 17時-9時は死守マスト
subtitles.english: Securing my own lazy time; defending 5 PM to 9 AM is an absolute must!

subtitles.original: さらに愛や恋や甘いも忘れずに とどのつまり
subtitles.english: Furthermore, not forgetting love, romance, and sweets; in the end...

subtitles.original: オーバーワークは立ち入り禁止ですよって注意喚起もしてますよ
subtitles.english: I'm even putting up warnings that overworking is strictly prohibited!

subtitles.original: ねえ楽して苦なくして生きてくって難しいな
subtitles.english: Hey, living easily without any suffering is pretty difficult, huh?

subtitles.original: だって「安定」「裏技」「一夜漬け」甘い蜜には罠がある やっ！
subtitles.english: Because with 'stability', 'cheats', and 'cramming', sweet honey always has a trap. Yah!

subtitles.original: 眠くなったら寝る
subtitles.english: If I get sleepy, I sleep.

subtitles.original: お昼過ぎに起きる
subtitles.english: I wake up past noon.

subtitles.original: 遊びたくて遊ぶ
subtitles.english: I play because I want to play.

subtitles.original: お腹減ったらご飯を食べる
subtitles.english: If I get hungry, I eat food.

subtitles.original: 嬉しかったら笑う
subtitles.english: If I'm happy, I laugh.

subtitles.original: 悲しかったら泣いてもいいんじゃない
subtitles.english: If I'm sad, isn't it okay to cry?

subtitles.original: 明日の私のために 今日もなんとか頑張るのさ
subtitles.english: For the sake of my future self, I'll somehow get through today too.

subtitles.original: 明日も頑張らなくていいように 頑張るのさ
subtitles.english: I'll work hard today, so that I won't have to work hard tomorrow.

subtitles.original: 半端ないぱっぱらぱっぱっぱっ
subtitles.english: Unbelievable pa-para-pa-pa-pa!

subtitles.original: 限界突破らぱっぱっぱっ
subtitles.english: Breaking limits pa-para-pa-pa-pa!

subtitles.original: 毎日半端ないぱっぱらぱっぱっ
subtitles.english: Every day is unbelievable pa-para-pa-pa-pa!

subtitles.original: 限界突破らぱっぱらぱっぱらぱっぱら
subtitles.english: Breaking limits pa-para-pa-para-pa-para-pa-pa!

subtitles.original: ねえあたし知ってるよ きみがひとりエックスエックスしてるの知ってるよ
subtitles.english: Hey, I know. I know you're doing 'XX' all by yourself.

subtitles.original: ピクンピクン震えてさ 声もダダ漏れなんだわ
subtitles.english: Trembling and twitching, your voice is leaking completely.

subtitles.original: 正直に言っちゃえよ バレてるんだし言っちゃえよ 効いてんの？
subtitles.english: Just say it honestly, it's already been exposed, so just say it. Is it working?

subtitles.original: 普通普通恥ずかしい？ みんな隠しているだけ
subtitles.english: Is it normal, normally embarrassing? Everyone is just hiding it.

subtitles.original: モニタリング
subtitles.english: Monitoring

subtitles.original: ねえあたし知ってるよ きみがひとり涙してるの知ってるよ
subtitles.english: Hey, I know. I know you're crying all by yourself.

subtitles.original: グスングスン凹んでさ 弱音ヒトカラ in the night
subtitles.english: Sniffling and feeling down, singing your complaints away in the night.

subtitles.original: 朝が来るまで一緒コース もっと泣いたって 何度だって受け止めてあげる
subtitles.english: We're in this together until morning. Even if you cry more, I'll catch you as many times as it takes.

subtitles.original: もう我慢しないで いっぱい出してね
subtitles.english: Don't hold back anymore, let it all out.

subtitles.original: Mwah! お願い きみが欲しいの
subtitles.english: Mwah! Please, I want you.

subtitles.original: 慰めさせて シェイクシェイク 愛の才能で
subtitles.english: Let me comfort you, shake shake, with my talent for love.

subtitles.original: 泣いてくれなきゃ 涸れてしまう 濡れていたい
subtitles.english: If you don't cry, I'll dry up. I want to be wet.

subtitles.original: ねえ いいでしょう？ 舐め取って 飲み干したいんだってば
subtitles.english: Hey, is it okay? I'm telling you, I want to lick it up and drink it dry.

subtitles.original: Mwah! お願い きみが欲しいの
subtitles.english: Mwah! Please, I want you.

subtitles.original: 頼り散らして シックラブ なんて最高ね
subtitles.english: Lean on me completely, a sick love is just the best, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 分けてくれなきゃ 君の“痛い”感じていたい
subtitles.english: If you don't share it, I want to feel your 'pain'.

subtitles.original: ねえ いいでしょう？ 吸い取って 救いたいんだってば
subtitles.english: Hey, is it okay? I'm telling you, I want to suck it out and save you.

subtitles.original: 見たい...
subtitles.english: I want to see...

subtitles.original: 見たいの きみの中
subtitles.english: I want to see inside of you.

subtitles.original: 見たい...
subtitles.english: I want to see...

subtitles.original: ねえあたし知ってるよ きみがひとり悔しがってんの知ってるよ
subtitles.english: Hey, I know. I know you're feeling frustrated all by yourself.

subtitles.original: ズキュンズキュン高まるじゃん きみを推すことをやめない
subtitles.english: My heart is throbbing and racing, I'll never stop supporting you.

subtitles.original: ねえあたし知ってるよ きみはできる子知ってるよ
subtitles.english: Hey, I know. I know you're a capable person.

subtitles.original: つらい時は弱いくらいで丁度いい あたしそれでも好きだよ
subtitles.english: When times are tough, being a bit weak is just right. I still love you regardless.

subtitles.original: Mwah! お願い きみが欲しいの
subtitles.english: Mwah! Please, I want you.

subtitles.original: 名前を呼んでよ いつだって会いに参上
subtitles.english: Call my name, I'll always show up to see you.

subtitles.original: きみはひとりだ だから歌う「ひとりじゃない」
subtitles.english: You are alone, so I sing 'you are not alone'.

subtitles.original: もういいでしょう ソロプレイはお仕舞いなんだってば
subtitles.english: That's enough, isn't it? I'm telling you, solo play is over.

subtitles.original: きみが病めるときも あたし側にいるわ
subtitles.english: Even when you are sick, I will be by your side.

subtitles.original: いつも見守っているわ そうよ怖くないのよ
subtitles.english: I will always watch over you. Yes, there's nothing to fear.

subtitles.original: Mwah! お願いきみが欲しいの
subtitles.english: Mwah! Please, I want you.

subtitles.original: 慰めさせて シェイクシェイク 愛の才能で
subtitles.english: Let me comfort you, shake shake, with my talent for love.

subtitles.original: 泣いてくれなきゃ 涸れてしまう 濡れていたい
subtitles.english: If you don't cry, I'll dry up. I want to be wet.

subtitles.original: ねえ いいでしょう？ 舐め取って 飲み干したいんだってば
subtitles.english: Hey, is it okay? I'm telling you, I want to lick it up and drink it dry.

subtitles.original: Mwah! お願いきみが欲しいの
subtitles.english: Mwah! Please, I want you.

subtitles.original: 頼り散らして シックラブ なんて最高ね
subtitles.english: Lean on me completely, a sick love is just the best, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 分けてくれなきゃ 君の“痛い”感じていたい 覗いていたい
subtitles.english: If you don't share it, I want to feel your 'pain', I want to peek inside.

subtitles.original: 吸い取って 救いたいんだってば
subtitles.english: I'm telling you, I want to suck it out and save you.

subtitles.original: ねえあたし知ってるよ きみがひとり涙してるの知ってるよ
subtitles.english: Hey, I know. I know you're crying all by yourself.

subtitles.original: グスングスン凹んでさ 弱音ヒトカラ in the night
subtitles.english: Sniffling and feeling down, singing your complaints away in the night.

subtitles.original: 朝が来るまで一緒コース もっと泣いたって 何度だって受け止めてあげる
subtitles.english: We're in this together until morning. Even if you cry more, I'll catch you as many times as it takes.

subtitles.original: もう我慢しないで 出してってば さあ
subtitles.english: Don't hold back anymore, let it all out, come on.

subtitles.original: ずうっといっしょ！
subtitles.english: Together forever!
